sentence_reviews.text: Clustering and mixture models divide observations into latent groups using distance, density, or probabilistic component assignments without task labels.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA, Ch. 19.8 unsupervised learning including k-means, hierarchical clustering, mixtures of Gaussians, and EM; PML clustering and mixture-model topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The source topics directly support clustering, mixtures, latent/component assignments, and unsupervised setup.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of k-means, mixture models & clustering is to connect Unsupervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations to downstream capabilities including Recommendation, ranking & personalization.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA unsupervised clustering/mixture topics; PML clustering, embeddings/representation, and recommender-adjacent ML topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Unsupervised clustering is supported; embeddings and recommendation/ranking downstream use are plausible but not directly established by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML clustering/mixture topics; no direct recommendation/ranking passage in packet evidence.
sentence_reviews.notes: Clustering can support segmentation/personalization, but the specific downstream substrate claim is not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA, Ch. 19.8 'Unsupervised Learning' contains clustering and mixture models; PML unsupervised clustering topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Clustering and mixture modeling are directly presented as unsupervised learning methods.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Unsupervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations.

sentence_reviews.notes: Unsupervised dependency is supported, but embeddings and the generic limitation are only partially evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: k-means, mixture models & clustering follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.

sentence_reviews.text: k-means, mixture models & clustering consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML representation-learning and clustering topics; AIMA nearest-neighbor/representation and clustering topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Clustering is commonly applied to vector representations, but the packet evidence does not make embeddings a core requirement.

sentence_reviews.text: k-means, mixture models & clustering is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family MCMC, EM & probabilistic message passing.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA unsupervised learning includes mixtures of Gaussians and the EM algorithm; PML EM and mixture-model topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: EM is directly supported for mixture models; k-means is related but not MCMC/message passing, so common strength is appropriate.

edge_reviews.notes: Clustering and mixtures are standard unsupervised methods; trained_under/core is supported.
Clustering operates on feature/vector representations, but embeddings are not required by the cited evidence; core strength is too strong.
EM is a standard learning method for mixture models; optimizes_for/common is supported for the combined node.
